title: cardamomum molle
intro: Cardamomum molle, also known as small cardamom, is a perennial herb belonging to the ginger family. It is native to the Western Ghats in India and has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic properties. The health benefits of Cardamomum molle include its ability to aid digestion, relieve nausea and vomiting, and help to reduce fever. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, tinctures, and capsules, which can be used to treat various health issues, such as indigestion, bloating, and respiratory problems.
